substrate_condition: A large mesh or net bag — likely containing substrate media, lava rock, or filter media — dominates the foreground. It appears tan/brown and textured, with organic debris visible in the mesh weave.
narrative: A single vivid red Neocaridina shrimp is perched confidently atop what appears to be a large mesh media bag in the foreground — a nice close-up look at one of the colony members. In the background, a submersible heater or CO2 diffuser is visible mounted to the rear glass with a suction cup, along with what looks like a canister or filter media container on the right edge.
image_subject: Close-up of tank interior featuring a single red cherry shrimp on a mesh media bag, with equipment visible in the background
